discussion_comments.comment_body:
Typecheck is failing here, but we can overcome with
```ts
import { env } from 'std-env'

const preferredPort = env.PORT ? parseInt(env.PORT, 10) : 5173
```

discussion_comments.comment_body:
I'm not sure if we can use `file:///test/workspace/src/icon2.png` here - we need to try
Another options:
- `${withoutProtocol(s)}?inline`
  `withoutProtocol` from [ufo](https://github.com/unjs/ufo))
- `/@fs${withoutProtocol(s)}?inline` 
  Vite is doing the same, prefix with `/@fs`, but not sure if it works with `?inline`
- Calc relative path to icon from vite root (I do not pass it to virtual modules, but can be added easily)

Actually, I've removed the `file://` from the `model.c4` file, and the errors have stopped - unlikely anyone would use that anyway?

Having said that, no errors but I can't actually see any rendered models in the loaded site. It's blank paging, which is better than the errors I was seeing...

How do I validate this, @davydkov?
